concerns.text: SC-001 requires ≥95% dataset completeness validation, but T011 only saves dataset with checksum without completeness threshold verification task
Constitution Principle V requires updating state YAML updated_at timestamp on artifact changes, but T031 only mentions updating state YAML without explicit timestamp update
Constitution Principle VI requires deterministic timezone scripts to have version recorded in code/, but T035 only validates timestamp storage without script version recording task
Constitution Principle VII requires feature extraction scripts to explicitly declare API fields they read, but T036 only validates output consistency without field declaration requirement
Constitution Principle IV requires all figures/statistics to trace to exactly one data row and code block, but no task validates this single-source-of-truth traceability
Constitution Principle III requires Repository-Hygiene Agent specifically for PII scans, but T037/T038 reference generic PII scan without agent specification task

Constitution Principle II requires Reference-Validator Agent to run at three specific checkpoints (artifact write, Advancement-Evaluator, research_review→research_accepted), but T039 only implements agent without checkpoint execution verification
